name_en: Premium quality, B's latest soft structured shoulder bag, crafted from cotton twill fabric. Made in an Italian workshop, decorated with fine B's exclusive check. Features an unlined design for a lightweight feel. Fuses smooth calfskin trim with a detachable zippered pouch. From the Burberry Classic Collection, interpreting a wardrobe essential with a bold brand style. Size 36x18.5×58
